Factsheet

Developer:
YorshInGame
Based in Paris, France
Release date:
April 8th, 2026
Platforms:
Itch.io
Steam
Website:
store.steampowered.com/developer/YorshInGame/
Regular Price:
USD 7.99

Request Press Copy

Description

5 Golden Skulls is an anomaly game (The Exit 8-like) taking place in a cursed Aztec temple. In solo or online co-op, find 5 skulls to escape the temple. In each room, you may only take the skull if there are no anomalies. Any mistake, or stepping on one of the many deadly traps, would lead to a painful death.

History

Practice Project

I made a small game so that I could try out some networking solutions and better understand how it works. The game ended up being fun to play and work on, so I polished it way further than expected and published it on Steam.

Features

  • Online co-op up to 4 players.
  • 180+ anomalies for good replayability.
  • Strong and unique mood.
  • Easy to pick up.
  • Quick play sessions.
